BACKGROUND_TEXTURE: Specify a 360-degree image for Cubemap mode, or a 2D image for Image mode.
SCREEN_USESPOUT: Enables video output to OBS via Spout. While active, the app screen will stop updating.
AVATAR_VRMMODELFILEPATH_HELP: A VRM model with Perfect Sync support is recommended. Without it, mouth movements will fall back to the 'aa' blend shape.
AVATAR_RESETPHYSICS_HELP: Resets physics bones that are stuck or in an unnatural position.
AVATAR_SELECTEDPREFAB_HELP: Select an avatar from the registered prefab list. Selecting will replace the current avatar.
GLTF_MODELFILEPATH_HELP: Path to a .gltf or .glb file to load. Changes take effect immediately.
